name: Roasted Garlic Puree Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove outer covering on garlic. Do not peel or separate the cloves.
2. Place each garlic head on a large square of heavy aluminum foil. Fold up the foil so the cloves are completely wrapped.
3. Bake for 1 hour at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Remove garlic from oven and cool for 10 minutes.
5. Separate cloves and squeeze to remove cooked garlic. Discard skins.
6. In a food processor, mix cheeses, milk, and garlic until smooth.
7. Place in serving dish.
8. Sprinkle with parsley.
9. Serve as a dip with crudites (mixed vegetables) for dipping. Makes 5 cups.
